title: Site Docs
content_html:
Site Docs

For documentation about the site’s main features and design, see the following sections:

  • Studio Studio routes, page wiring, and Studio-specific behavior.
  • UI site-wide UI rules, docs-viewer/search UI standards, Studio UI patterns, and CSS guidance.
  • Change Requests proposed and in-progress request docs, including UI request specs and task breakdowns.
  • Architecture route/runtime building blocks, shared shell behavior, and generated-artifact flow into the live site.
  • Config checked-in config files and loader modules, what reads them, and when.
  • Data Models the main reference for generated/runtime data contracts and source-data records.
  • Scripts repo scripts, their flags, outputs, and operational responsibilities.
  • Docs Viewer the shared docs module used by /docs/ and /library/.
  • Search dedicated catalogue search plus inline docs-domain search.

Key Docs

  • Development Workflow end-to-end lifecycle guidance for human and Codex implementation work, including rules for maintaining the site change log.
  • Site Change Log meaningful non-search site and Studio history.
  • Change History Reports manage-only structured change-history views generated from _docs_logs/.
  • Runtime Dependencies checked-in dependency sources, critical versus workflow-specific packages, and local/cloud dependency expectations.
  • UI Audits saved page-level UI conformance reviews and follow-up audit records.
summary: This section contains technical reference documents that apply to the site as a whole.
